rulings.Case Title: MAPLE RABB VS. HILFASCO INCORPORATED DBA CENTURY 21 ALLIANCE, A et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, September 21, 2009, line 2, DEFENDANTS JAMES CHIN, ORHAN TOLU, and, HILFASCO INCORPORATED Notice Of Motion For Fees. Defendants' Motion for fees denied. The underlying settlement agreement was raised as a defense to the complaint and was not a basis on which plaintiff sought relief. No party brought an action against the other by reason of any breach of the settlement agreement. The Real Estate Purchase Agreement was not the basis on which plaintiff sought relief. Rather, the various fraud, breach of contract, elder abuse and misrepresentation arguments related to an alleged oral "Agency Agreement" without an attorney fee provision. Plaintiff's motion to tax costs granted. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS VS. LULA M. HOBBS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, September 21, 2009, line 3, PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. Granted without leave to amend, no opposition filed. The Court adopts plaintiff's proposed judgment. (Plaintiff must also submit a separate proposed order granting plaintiff's motion. ) =(302/CWW)
